---
title: unreachable-code
description: "Detect statements after unconditional flow."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect statements after unconditional flow. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
return nil
save()
```

## Good

```go
save()
return nil
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only unreachable-code`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
